title: Craftable Chainmail Armor
body:
## Recipes ![Craft chainmail armor like iron armor but replace the iron ingots with chains.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e24fb2dc6449612d98be93c2021338a8a6b65018.gif) ### How to unlock the recipes in the recipe book? **Pre-1.21.9**: Get a chain.\ **1.21.9**: Get an iron chain.
### Recipe Book Category (1.19.4+): Equipment ## I want chainmail armor to be cheaper than iron armor. Download **[Craft More Chains](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craft-more-chains)**, a mod/datapack that gives you 2 chains from the chain recipe instead of 1. This makes chainmail armor cheaper than iron armor. **Comparison between Iron Armor and Chainmail armor with [Craft More Chains](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craft-more-chains):** | Armor Piece | Iron Armor | Chainmail Armor | |-------------|:--------------:|:----------------:| | Helmet | 5 iron ingots | 3.0 iron ingots | | Chestplate | 8 iron ingots | 4.8 iron ingots | | Leggings | 7 iron ingots | 4.2 iron ingots | | Boots | 4 iron ingots | 2.4 iron ingots | | Total | 24 iron ingots | 14.4 iron ingots | So crafting a full set of iron armor costs 24 iron ingots, while a full set of chainmail armor costs only 15 iron ingots, which is a fair price.
**Check out my other mods [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Sumbaii999).**
